transcript: Hi, this is Colin. Can I help you?
Yeah, I need a squid sandwich in the next five to ten minutes. Don't have a whole lot of time here on this sandwich.
You don't have a lot of time?
Okay, well... then, I don't know if I can help you.
And you're going to have to accept coins.
We accept coins if they're... US coins.
Most of 'em are. Listen, do you want me to come down?
You... you're more than welcome to come down!
I'll come down and pick the damn thing up.
We have frozen calamari so you'd have to wait for it to defrost. Five minutes, it's not gonna happen.
Oh, it's gonna happen one way or the other, pal.
M'kay, I'm... sorry, but are we having a problem here?

Your squid sandwich... is not made. If you would like a squid sandwich, we are more than welcome to get you a squid sandwich, but it's gonna take longer than five minutes. And yes, you can pay with coins.
I'll bring my boot to y'all. How's that sound?
No, I don't think you would do that, 'cause then I would have to get the police involved.
Buddy, I'm gonna kick ya in the seat a couple times.
Yeah, I'm... I'm gonna have to hang up now, okay? I'm gonna have to hang up, so... if you'd like a squid sandwich, I'd be more than happy to make you one. [unclear]
I'm gonna have to get, uh, the police involved. Okay? I'm gonna have to hang up.
